case_title: AMERIOCAN EXPRESS TRAVEL RELATED SERVICES VS. KEVIN NG et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERIOCAN EXPRESS TRAVEL RELATED SERVICES COMPANY, INC., A NEW YORK CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT NG, KEVIN DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-24-2009
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON KEVIN NG FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERIOCAN EXPRESS TRAVEL RELATED SERVICES COMPANY, INC., A NEW YORK CORP.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-14-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-14-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
